'''dhovazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:pubelike|pubelike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-v-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pubelike|pubelike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhovazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhovazhithi|dhovazhithi]] || [[word:dhovazhiji|dhovazhiji]] || [[word:dhovazhishi|dhovazhishi]] || [[word:dhovazhiki|dhovazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhovazhuthuthu|dhovazhuthuthu]] || [[word:dhovazhujuju|dhovazhujuju]] || [[word:dhovazhushushu|dhovazhushushu]] || [[word:dhovazhukuku|dhovazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhovazhuthu|dhovazhuthu]] || [[word:dhovazhuju|dhovazhuju]] || [[word:dhovazhushu|dhovazhushu]] || [[word:dhovazhuku|dhovazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhovazhufthuf|dhovazhufthuf]] || [[word:dhovazhufjuf|dhovazhufjuf]] || [[word:dhovazhufshuf|dhovazhufshuf]] || [[word:dhovazhufkuf|dhovazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhovazhethe|dhovazhethe]] || [[word:dhovazheje|dhovazheje]] || [[word:dhovazheshe|dhovazheshe]] || [[word:dhovazheke|dhovazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhovazhothotho|dhovazhothotho]] || [[word:dhovazhojojo|dhovazhojojo]] || [[word:dhovazhoshosho|dhovazhoshosho]] || [[word:dhovazhokoko|dhovazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhovazhotho|dhovazhotho]] || [[word:dhovazhojo|dhovazhojo]] || [[word:dhovazhosho|dhovazhosho]] || [[word:dhovazhoko|dhovazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhovazhofthof|dhovazhofthof]] || [[word:dhovazhofjof|dhovazhofjof]] || [[word:dhovazhofshof|dhovazhofshof]] || [[word:dhovazhofkof|dhovazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhovazhĂŻfthĂŻf|dhovazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhovazhĂŻfjĂŻf|dhovazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhovazhĂŻfshĂŻf|dhovazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhovazhĂŻfkĂŻf|dhovazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhovazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhovazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhovazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhovazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhovazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhovazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhovazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhovazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhovazhĂŻfthĂŻf|dhovazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhovazhĂŻfjĂŻf|dhovazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhovazhĂŻfshĂŻf|dhovazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhovazhĂŻfkĂŻf|dhovazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhovazhĂŻfthĂŻf|dhovazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhovazhĂŻfjĂŻf|dhovazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhovazhĂŻfshĂŻf|dhovazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhovazhĂŻfkĂŻf|dhovazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhovazhĂŠthĂŠ|dhovazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhovazhĂŠjĂŠ|dhovazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhovazhĂŠshĂŠ|dhovazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhovazhĂŠkĂŠ|dhovazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhovazhathatha|dhovazhathatha]] || [[word:dhovazhajaja|dhovazhajaja]] || [[word:dhovazhashasha|dhovazhashasha]] || [[word:dhovazhakaka|dhovazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhovazhatha|dhovazhatha]] || [[word:dhovazhaja|dhovazhaja]] || [[word:dhovazhasha|dhovazhasha]] || [[word:dhovazhaka|dhovazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhovazhafthaf|dhovazhafthaf]] || [[word:dhovazhafjaf|dhovazhafjaf]] || [[word:dhovazhafshaf|dhovazhafshaf]] || [[word:dhovazhafkaf|dhovazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhovazhasha|dhovazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhovazhshĂ«sha|dhovazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhovazhrosha|dhovazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhovazhmusha|dhovazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhovazhyasha|dhovazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhovazhnkshĂ«sha|godhovazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhovazhnkrosha|godhovazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhovazhnkmusha|godhovazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhovazhnkyasha|godhovazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhovavazhasha|dhovavazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhovavazhshĂ«sha|dhovavazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhovavazhrosha|dhovavazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhovavazhmusha|dhovavazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhovavazhyasha|dhovavazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhovavazhnkshĂ«sha|godhovavazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhovavazhnkrosha|godhovavazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhovavazhnkmusha|godhovavazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhovavazhnkyasha|godhovavazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhevĂŠzhasha|dhevĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhevĂŠzhshĂ«sha|dhevĂŠzhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhevĂŠzhrosha|dhevĂŠzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhevĂŠzhmusha|dhevĂŠzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhevĂŠzhyasha|dhevĂŠzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhevĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha|godhevĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhevĂŠzhnkrosha|godhevĂŠzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhevĂŠzhnkmusha|godhevĂŠzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhevĂŠzhnkyasha|godhevĂŠzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhovfazhasha|dhovfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhovfazhshĂ«sha|dhovfazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhovfazhrosha|dhovfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhovfazhmusha|dhovfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhovfazhyasha|dhovfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhovfazhnkshĂ«sha|godhovfazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhovfazhnkrosha|godhovfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhovfazhnkmusha|godhovfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhovfazhnkyasha|godhovfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
